fallback.note: All four recovery rungs (browserUA, reader/jina, wayback, reputable-mirror) failed for every attempted source across all three domains. Organizational egress proxy blocks HTTPS CONNECT tunnel to virtually all external hosts. rawMethodCounts reflect the investigator's actual recovery vocabulary (browserUA/reader/wayback/mirror). The template's fallback panel uses wayback/mirror/altsource keys; all zero so the taxonomy mismatch (CLAUDE.md §8 known gap) has no numeric impact this run.

rejected.reason: Verifier rejection: excerpt covers only the general product description and does not substantiate version v2.3, July 11 release date, or simultaneous three-UE-version packaging; dynamic releases/latest URL does not lock to v2.3; confidence 0.52 below 0.6 gate.

Investigator drop: article accessible (July 7) but WebFetch returned a model-generated summary rather than raw article text; no verbatim excerpt identifiable with confidence; dropped per excerpt-gate rule.
